detectors.description:
Reentrancy in GSNYToken._transfer(address,address,uint256) (GSNYToken.sol#647-771):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (GSNYToken.sol#711)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (GSNYToken.sol#785-797)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (GSNYToken.sol#717)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (GSNYToken.sol#805)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (GSNYToken.sol#769)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (GSNYToken.sol#931)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (GSNYToken.sol#911)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (GSNYToken.sol#913)
	GSNYToken._rOwned (GSNYToken.sol#323) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GSNYToken._takeTeam(uint256) (GSNYToken.sol#925-933)
	- GSNYToken._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (GSNYToken.sol#885-921)
	- GSNYToken.balanceOf(address) (GSNYToken.sol#473-477)
	- GSNYToken.constructor() (GSNYToken.sol#407-437)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (GSNYToken.sol#769)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (GSNYToken.sol#939)
	GSNYToken._rTotal (GSNYToken.sol#335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GSNYToken._getCurrentSupply() (GSNYToken.sol#1081-1091)
	- GSNYToken._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (GSNYToken.sol#937-943)
	- GSNYToken.constructor() (GSNYToken.sol#407-437)
	- GSNYToken.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (GSNYToken.sol#569-591)
